titleStmt.title: SII 18.90: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 90. (B.K. No. 35 of 1933-34.) SIRUGUPPI, HUBLI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the village chāvaḍi.

summary.p: This worn out inscription which refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva, is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 7 (in words), Dundubhi, Pushya s11u. Tadige, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa—saṁkrānti, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1082, December 25, Sunday.

It records the grant of land made by the One-hundred Mahājanas of Biḷigiḷigēri to the god Vishṇudēva of that village. The agrahāra Siriguppe and the One-hundred (Mahājanas) of the place are highly praised.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyāviṣkṟitaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōṁnnatadaṁṣṭrāgra viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
namastasmai varāhāya līlayā caratē mahīṁ khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ khaṇakhaṇāyatē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . śrīvadhuviṁge tā
ne neleyāgi dharitriyoḷoḷpuvettu nānāvidha vastuviṁdenōḍe beḷvaladēśadoḷagrahāra murvvīvidita
janamējayarāja ppa sadvijarinoppi karaṁ siriguppe śōbhikuṁ . janapa
śrījanamējaya bhūmi dhārā pūrvvakaṁ
māḍi sarvvanamaśya śrī siriguppeyunnatike
yaṁ vyāvarṇṇisalbarppude . kaṁ . Alliya vipra śāstrapāraga
śrīvallabharudāracarita mūvattircchāsira
svastyanēkaguṇagaṇāḷaṁ
krita rjjapaniya
dhyānavāraṇamaunānuṣṭāṇaparāyaṇarvviśiṣṭajanāśrayarannādya dānigaḷa
nādi jjanamējayarāja maniratarssa
ptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitrīkritaśarīrarāśritajanakalpavṛkṣarēkavākya
rddharmmavicāra śrīmadagrahāraṁ siriguppeya mahājanamaṟuvatta
nālvaruṁ dharma mahā
janaṁ nūrvvara prabhāva Ā meṁteṁdoḍe kaṁ
lvaroḷu janisida saccāritra
cōviḷāsarakhiḷaśrutapāraga ruttamarvviśiṣṭaśi
ṣṭavatpalaraghadūra biḷigiḷigēriya dvijara
nudghayaśōvaḷaya ramaṇāṁghrisarōruhamadamadhu
paruttamarvvēdāḍhyarccāruca nūrvvarmmahājanaṁ kēvaḷame .
Antu vēdaśāstrapravīṇaru nisida śrīmadbiḷigiḷigēri
ya mahājanaṁ nūrvvarumaśēṣa maṟuvatta nālvaranujñeyaṁ paḍe
du viścāmitragōtrapavitra kūḍi vāmayyaṁ māḍisida śrī
viṣṇudēvara munna ya baṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga dommara
traipuruṣadēvara sarvvanamaśyamāgi biṭṭa ma
ttarmmūṟu mattamā biḷigiḷigēṟiya mahājanaṁ nūrvvarumaśēṣamiṟdu dēvaraṁ
gabhōgakkā bhūmi ṟeyadeṁdu dharmacittarāgi cāḷukyavikramavarṣadēḷaneya duṁ
dubhi saṁvatsarada pauśya suddha tadige yādityavāraduttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatī
pātanimittamā pu biḷigiḷiyalu śrīviṣṇudēvargge ḍaga ya po
ladoḷūra pāḷa pola ṭṭepaḍuvalmaṁṭūra
pola muṭṭe paṁ sarvvabādhāparihāra
sarvvanamaśyamā rintī bhūmiyoḷpuṭṭida
rthamaṁ dēvaraṁgabhō nandādīvigegaṁ dēgulada jīrṇnō ddhārakkaṁ pa
risūtrada kērigaṁ pu ntī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavaṁ
gā sāgaraṁ vāraṇā
rtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsirvvarvvē hmaṇargge
guma
Digital edition of SII 18.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
